title: NUTRIUPS 8.5" Glass Pie Dish - 22cm Round Bake Plate with Handle, High Heat Resistance, Serves 1100ML, Ideal for Cake, Tart, Flan
features: 🍒【Heat-resistant Glass】 The 8.5 inch glass pie dish uses heat-resistant glass, making 22cm glass baking pie dish safe for oven, microwave, refrigerator, and freezer and the 1100ML pie plates are super tough, standing up to years and years of baking your favorite pies.

🍒【Clear glass and Practical Handles】The clear glass of this 8.5 inch glass cake tin allows you to observe the progress of cooking and baking. Two ergonomic handles of this 22cm glass flan dish ensure holding and moving the 8.5 inch cake tin is safe and easy.

🍒【Size and Portion Control】 The 8.5 inch round glass serving dish measures is 22cm TOP DIAMETER x 18.52cm BASE DIAMETER x 4.5cm DEEP. The 1100MLGlass Baking Pan is great for portion controlling and make-ahead meals.

🍒【Application】The 22cm glass baking pie tin is Ideal to cook and serve, bake pies, quiches, flan, tarts, crumbles, roast chicken, fish, and more. The 8.5 inch round pie dish can be as a pie baking dish for quiche or serving plate for vegetables. Satisfy all kinds of need.

🍒【Easy to clean and for 3-4 people】The round pie dish 22 cm features non-stick surface. The 8.5 inch diameter pie dish does not absorb food odors, flavors or stains and DISHWASHER SAFE.The 8.5 inch round pie dish is suitable for 3-4people.
description: Product Description Satisfy All Kinds of Need The NUTRIUPS glass pie dish is suitable for pumpkin pie, shepards pie, apple pie, blueberry pie, flan, tarts and more, also it can be as a baking dish for quiche or serving plate for vegetables. Satisfy all kinds of need. Best Glass Pie Dish for Storage, Baking, Serving, Cooking and Microwave Product Details Name: NUTRIUPS Oven Round Glass Deep Pie Plate Material: Lead-free tempered glass Size: 16.5cm/6.5inches - 350g, 20cm/8 inches - 500g, 22cm/9 inches - 600g, 25cm/10 inches - 900g The petal-shaped handle is convenient for moving the baking tray Tempered glass is safe, durable, non-toxic and harmless Glass bakeware is suitable for dishwashers, reducing the burden of washing dishes Glass pie dish is not only an essential kitchenware for the family, but also a good-looking and practical gift for friends Heat-Resistant Glass The glass pie dish has strong impact resistance and better thermal stability, is suitable for microwave oven and oven heating. Easy Grip Handle Easy grip petal shaped handles allow it to be easily moved without sticking your thumb in the pie. Stackable Pie Plates Multiple sizes for different applications, stackable, space saving. NUTRIUPS NUTRIUPS is committed to providing you with a better life
